name: Ahrefs
description: Ahrefs provides SEO and backlink data products accessible programmatically via the Ahrefs API v3 for paying customers.

auth_methods.note: Documentation explicitly states authentication uses API tokens (API keys) that can be provided as a Bearer Authorization header or as a token query parameter.

credential_access.note: Introduction and Limits pages state API v3 is available to paying customers and API access must be enabled on the workspace; pricing page shows plans are paid. Developers can generate API tokens in the dashboard but API access is tied to paid plans/units.

api_surface.note: Docs reference API v3 REST endpoints (site-explorer, keywords-explorer, backlinks, etc.) at base URL https://apiv3.ahrefs.com and indicate multiple product endpoints are available (broad coverage).

buildability.note: Documentation and pricing indicate API requires a paying account with API access/units. Once payment/plan is in place, developers can generate API tokens in the dashboard and call the REST endpoints.

queries: Ahrefs API authentication API token API key
